metadata.name: Assess Risk of a Labor Strike

description: News reports indicate a potential labor strike by local union electricians. A PM must assess the risk to the project.

nodes.task_description: Identify all upcoming tasks assigned to the electrical subcontractor.

expected_outcome.value: A list of all electrical tasks for the next 60 days is generated.

nodes.task_description: Log the potential strike in the risk register, classifying it as 'High Impact, Low Probability'.

expected_outcome.value: A new entry is created in the risk register.

nodes.task_description: As a contingency, identify a non-union electrical subcontractor that could be used if the strike occurs.
